name: OpenClaw Guard
description: Protect workspace files from prompt injection. Default-deny tool policy for untrusted sessions with file path guards, exec scanning, and audit logging.

protectedFiles.description: File patterns (relative to workspace root, minimatch glob) that are always blocked for read/write/edit.

trustedSessionPatterns.description: Minimatch patterns for trusted session keys. '*:main' maps to owner (unrestricted); other patterns map to trusted (file guards only, all tools allowed). Everything else is untrusted (default-deny).

untrustedToolAllowlist.description: Tools unconditionally allowed in untrusted sessions (no file/workspace access). Tools not in this list and not handled by specific guards are blocked.

sandboxDir.description: Directory where external session file writes are redirected. Defaults to <workspace_parent>/workspace_guard/sandbox.

protectedLiterals.description: File name literals checked in exec commands. Defaults to base names of protectedFiles without globs.

execScanning.description: Enable best-effort scanning of exec commands for references to protected files.

auditLog.description: Enable after_tool_call audit logging for all non-owner tool calls.
